name: CONTRACT-BUG-23
title: policy-block.py print_usage prints None because no module docstring exists
description: scripts/policy-block.py line 69 calls print(__doc__) but no module-level docstring exists (only # comments). __doc__ is None so print_usage prints 'None'. Replace with literal usage string or add docstring.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 1: validate-feature.py run.py path; check-naming.py rbt- prefix; module docstrings; runner invokes all tests; dead tests deleted.
